name: 2.5 MG Tablets IP
about: The 2.5 MG Tablets IP are a type of medication that comes in a tablet form. These tablets are primarily used for treating various health conditions such as high blood pressure, anxiety, and seizures. One of the primary features of these tablets is that they have a shelf life of 12-24 months, which makes them an ideal choice for long-term use. The tablets have a normal fermentation smell, which is completely harmless and doesnt interfere with the efficacy of the medication. These tablets are manufactured and sourced from India, ensuring that they meet the highest quality standards. As an exporter, supplier, and trader of this product, we ensure that our customers receive only the best quality medication that meets their specific needs.
